title: GitHub - filipecalegario/awesome-vibe-coding: A curated list of vibe coding references, collaborating with AI to write code.
author: Filipecalegario
text:
A curated list of vibe coding references, collaborating with AI to write code.
English | Português | 한국어 | 中文 | 日本語
- About the concept
- Browser-based Tools
- IDEs and Code Editors
- Mobile Apps
- Plugins and Extensions
- Local Apps
- Command Line Tools
- Task Management for AI Coding
- Documentation for AI Coding
- Communities & Job Boards
- News and Social Media
- Contribute
- Andrej Karpathy on X - "There's a new kind of coding I call "vibe coding", where you fully give in to the vibes, embrace exponentials, and forget that the code even exists. (.) I'm building a project or webapp, but it's not really coding - I just see stuff, say stuff, run stuff, and copy paste stuff, and it mostly works".
- automata/aicodeguide - A roadmap to start coding with AI.
- Bolt.new - Prompt, run, edit, and deploy full-stack web and mobile apps.
- 🔥 Lovable - "Idea to app in seconds. Lovable is your superhuman full stack engineer".
- v0 by Vercel - Assistant to build Next.js frontend.
- Capacity - Turn your ideas into fully functional web apps in minutes using AI.
- CHAI.new by Langbase - Prompt to vibe code any AI agent and deploy (agent, app, api).
- Replit - "Simply describe your idea above and let the Agent build it for you".
- Create - "Turn your words into sites, tools, apps, and products".
- Trickle AI - "Build stunning websites, AI apps, and forms with ease".
- Tempo - "Build React apps 10x faster with AI".
- Softgen - "Describe your vision, give instructions, and build full-stack web apps".
- Lazy AI - "Build reliable business apps with prompts".
- HeyBoss - "Build app & sites in minutes".
- Creatr - "Create and deploy web apps and landing pages in seconds".
- Rork - "Build any mobile app, fast".
- Firebase Studio - Google's agentic cloud-based development environment that helps build and ship production-quality full-stack AI apps.
- Napkins.dev - Screenshot to code.
- HeroUI Chat - Generate beautiful apps regardless of your design experience.
- Rocket.new - "Build Web & Mobile Apps 10x Faster Without Code".
- Google AI Studio - "Another way to vibecode with Gemini. Great for experimenting".
- Windsurf Editor by Codeium - Agentic IDE, "where the work of developers and AI truly flow together, allowing for a coding experience that feels like literal magic".
- Cursor - AI Code Editor, "the best way to code with AI".
- Zed - Code editor designed for high-performance collaboration with humans and AI.
- Amazon Kiro - The AI IDE for prototype to production.
- Google Antigravity - Google's IDE built around an agent-first approach.
- Orchids - The Vibe Coding IDE.
- VibeCode - The app that builds apps.
- Cline - AI assistant that can use your CLI aNd Editor, for VS Code.
- Roo Code - Fork of Cline with extra features and enhancements.
- Kilo Code - Open-source AI coding agent extension for popular IDEs like VS Code and JetBrains.
- Amp - Frontier coding agent for your terminal and editor, built by Sourcegraph.
- avante.nvim - Neovim plugin designed to emulate the behavior of the Cursor AI IDE with AI-driven code suggestions.
- backnotprop/prompt-tower - A tool that helps you build prompts with many code blocks.
- Augment Code - An AI coding assistant built for professional software engineers and large codebases.
- continuedev/continue - Build, share, and use custom AI code assistants with open-source IDE extensions.
- GitHub Copilot - AI pair programmer that offers code completion, chat, and agent mode for agentic coding.
- Amazon Q Developer – AWS - Amazon's Generative AI Assistant for Software Development.
- Superdesign.dev - Open Source Design Agent.
- Dyad - Free, local, open-source AI app builder.
- 🔥 anthropics/claude-code - Coding agent that understands your codebase, automates tasks, explains code, and manages Git, all via natural language.
- aider - AI pair programming in your terminal.
- codename goose - Local, on-machine AI Agent that allows you to use any LLM and add any MCP servers as extensions.
- MyCoder.ai - Open source AI-powered coding assistant with Git and GitHub integration, featuring parallel execution and self-modification capabilities.
- ai-christianson/RA.Aid - A standalone coding agent built on LangGraph's agent-based task execution framework.
- CodeSelect - A Python-based command-line tool that efficiently communicates project source code to AIs.
- OpenAI Codex CLI - OpenAI's lightweight coding agent that runs in the terminal.
- Gemini CLI - An open-source AI agent from Google that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.
- QwenLM/qwen-code - "qwen-code is a coding agent that lives in digital world".
- opencode - "AI coding agent built for the terminal".
- charmbracelet/crush - "The glamorous AI coding agent for your favourite terminal", generates command line interfaces.
- Warp - A Rust-based command line featuring native AI integration.
- vibe-cli - An AI-powered CLI tool that enables collaborative coding sessions, code generation, and workflow automation directly from your terminal.
- langchain-code - LangChain-based coding agent for AI-assisted development.
- kimi-cli - Official command-line interface for Kimi, an AI assistant that helps with coding tasks and development workflows.
- Cloudflare/vibesdk - Cloudflare's SDK for vibe coding.
- superagent-ai/vibekit - A toolkit for building vibe coding applications.
- mistralai/mistral-vibe - Mistral AI's vibe coding tool.
- HKUDS/DeepCode - Deep learning for code analysis and generation.
- EnzeD/vibe-coding - Vibe coding tool and framework.
- Gentleman-Programming/gentleman-guardian-angel - Provider-agnostic code review using AI. Use Claude, Gemini, Codex, Ollama to enforce your coding standards.
- superagent-ai/grok-cli - Command-line interface for AI-powered coding assistance.
- GitHub Copilot CLI - GitHub Copilot coding agent directly in your terminal with agentic capabilities, GitHub integration, and MCP-powered extensibility.
- Boomerang Tasks - Automatically break down complex projects into smaller, manageable pieces.
- Claude Task Master - An AI-powered task-management system you can drop into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, Roo, and others.
- 🔥 vibe-kanban - A kanban board to manage and orchestrate AI coding agents.
- CodeGuide - Creates detailed Documentation for your AI Coding Projects.
- AGENTS.md - A simple, open format for guiding coding agents.
- KhazP/vibe-coding-prompt-template - A prompt template for vibe coding.
- awesome-ralph - A curated list of resources about Ralph, the vibe coding technique that runs vibe coding agents in automated loops until specifications are fulfilled.
- Vibehackers - Community gallery for vibe coded projects and curated job board.
- /r/vibecoding
- /r/ChatGPTCoding
This section displays items in reverse chronological order, with the most recent entries at the top.
- The Prompt Engineering Playbook for Programmers
- What is vibe coding? A computer scientist explains what it means to have AI write computer code − and what risks that can entail
- Peer Programming with LLMs, For Senior+ Engineers
- 🔥 The Way of Code | Rick Rubin
- The State of Vibe Coding Tools (May 2025) | LinkedIn
- Vibe coding MenuGen | karpathy
- Two publishers and three authors fail to understand what "vibe coding" means
- Not all AI-assisted programming is vibe coding (but vibe coding rocks)
- Vibe Coding 101 with Replit - DeepLearning.AI
- The "vibe coding" mind virus explained… by Fireship - YouTube
- bolt.new on X - Introducing Figma to Bolt
- Will the future of software development run on vibes? - Ars Technica
- Vibe Coding - Where Everyone Can 'Speak' Computer Programming - The New Stack
- A.I. and Vibecoding Helped Me to Create My Own Software - The New York Times
- Vibe Engineering
Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.
